security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://api.github.com; media-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; frame-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: The Sustainable Ethical Agentic Operating System
bundle.longDescription: FreEco.ai is an open-source, sustainable, ethical Agent Operating System — run, orchestrate, and extend AI agents across every channel from your desktop. Built on OpenFang.
